title: HardER
description:
Just pure Minecraft, but harder. Just like the old days.

No new items. No new mobs.

Just harder.
body:
**No new items. No new mobs. Just pure Minecraft, but harder. Just like the old days.**

Over the years, Minecraft has gained many over-powered features and strategies for minimizing and even completely avoiding the survival aspects of "survival" Minecraft.

Now days, even hardcore is incredibly easy if you know what you're doing. The "first night" no longer lives up to its name like it used to.

This datapack fixes that problem while maintaining the vanilla feel.

Play in hardcore for the most intense challenge.

---

# What does it change?

**Beds**

- You can no longer skip the night. (However, you can still lay down to set your spawn point and reset the phantom timer.)

**Sprinting**

- Some mobs are faster... MUCH faster.
- Some mobs see you from slightly farther away.
- Some mobs deal slightly more damage.
- Creeper fuse is shorter.

**Enchanting**

- Enchanting tables and enchanted books have been removed from the game. (However, you can still get enchanted items and combine them in anvils.)
- The librarian profession has been removed from the game.

**Trading**

- Villagers never level up from trades.

**Totems**

- Totems of Undying have been removed from the game.

**Some resources**

- Fortune no longer works on diamond ore.
- Looting no longer works on meat.
- Golden apples require gold blocks to craft.
- F3 screen no longer shows coords and other data.
